title: sida ciliaris var. mexicana
intro: Sida ciliaris var. mexicana, also known as Mexican sida or sida, is a plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Sida ciliaris var. mexicana include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or topical creams, and is often used in traditional medicine to treat conditions such as skin infections, wounds, and fever.
